After visiting Bapun temple, we visited the famous Ta Prohm temple located on the eastern side of the Angkor Thom temple premises. It is said that this temple was built at the end of 12th century by King Jayavarman VII for his mother. This temple, in reality, is a Buddhist royal place of residence. During the arena of King Jayavarman, the influence of Buddhist religion was on the rise in Khmer empire.
